import re, unicodedata, json, math, difflib, numpy as np, pandas as pd, collections, statistics

# Normalization helpers
AR_DIACRITICS_PATTERN = re.compile(r"[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]")
PUNCT_PATTERN = re.compile(r"[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]")  # remove non-Arabic punctuation (keep letters+digits+space)
TATWEEL = "\u0640"

def normalize_ar(s):
    if s is None:
        return ""
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, "")
    s = AR_DIACRITICS_PATTERN.sub("", s)
    # unify hamza/alif forms
    s = re.sub("[\u0622\u0623\u0625\u0671\u0672\u0673\u0675]", "ا", s)  # آأإٱ variants to ا
    s = s.replace("ؤ", "و").replace("ئ", "ي").replace("ة", "ه")  # maybe convert ta marbuta to heh for robustness
    s = s.replace("ى", "ي")
    # remove punctuation (Arabic/English)
    s = re.sub(r"[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9\s]", " ", s)  # keep Arabic letters, digits, spaces
    # collapse whitespace
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s

def extract_texts(obj):
    # Return concatenated text fields from hadith record
    fields = []
    for k in ["hadithTxt", "Matn", "matn", "text", "hadith_text"]:
        if k in obj and obj[k]:
            fields.append(str(obj[k]))
    return " ".join(fields).strip()

def token_f1(a, b):
    da = normalize_ar(a)
    db = normalize_ar(b)
    ta = da.split()
    tb = db.split()
    # Multiset intersection count
    counter_a = collections.Counter(ta)
    counter_b = collections.Counter(tb)
    common = sum((counter_a & counter_b).values())
    if common==0:
        return 0.0
    P = common / len(tb)  # tokens in candidate that are in original?
    R = common / len(ta)
    F1 = 2*P*R/(P+R)
    return F1, P, R, common, len(ta), len(tb)

orig_full = orig

def best_candidates_by_ratio(orig_text, k=10):
    no = normalize_ar(orig_text)
    results=[]
    for o in hadith:
        t = extract_texts(o)
        nt = normalize_ar(t)
        # compute SequenceMatcher ratio
        ratio = difflib.SequenceMatcher(a=no, b=nt).ratio()
        results.append((ratio, o))
    results.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
    return results[:k]

def best_candidates_by_token_f1(orig_text, k=10):
    no = normalize_ar(orig_text)
    res=[]
    for o in hadith:
        t = extract_texts(o)
        f1, P, R, common, lena, lenb = token_f1(orig_text, t)
        res.append((f1, P, R, common, o))
    res.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
    return res[:k]

[(r, o['hadithID'], o['BookID']) for r,o in best_ratio], [(r, o['hadithID'], o['BookID']) for r,_,_,_,o in best_f1]

def token_f1_details(a, b):
    da = normalize_ar(a)
    db = normalize_ar(b)
    ta = da.split()
    tb = db.split()
    counter_a = collections.Counter(ta)
    counter_b = collections.Counter(tb)
    common = sum((counter_a & counter_b).values())
    if common==0:
        return (0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0, len(ta), len(tb))
    P = common / len(tb)
    R = common / len(ta)
    F1 = 2*P*R/(P+R)
    return (F1, P, R, common, len(ta), len(tb))

def best_candidates_by_token_f1(orig_text, k=10):
    res=[]
    for o in hadith:
        t = extract_texts(o)
        F1, P, R, common, lena, lenb = token_f1_details(orig_text, t)
        res.append((F1, P, R, common, o))
    res.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
    return res[:k]

best_ratio = best_candidates_by_ratio(orig_full, 5)

[(round(r,3), o['hadithID'], o['BookID']) for r,o in best_ratio], [(round(r,3), o['hadithID'], o['BookID']) for r,_,_,_,o in best_f1]

def extract_preferred_text(o):
    # Prefer Matn if available else hadithTxt
    m = o.get("Matn")
    if m:
        return m.strip()
    return o.get("hadithTxt","").strip()

def best_candidates_by_ratio_on_matn(orig_text, k=10):
    no = normalize_ar(orig_text)
    results=[]
    for o in hadith:
        t = extract_preferred_text(o)
        nt = normalize_ar(t)
        ratio = difflib.SequenceMatcher(a=no, b=nt).ratio()
        results.append((ratio, o))
    results.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
    return results[:k]

def best_candidates_by_token_f1_on_matn(orig_text, k=10):
    res=[]
    for o in hadith:
        t = extract_preferred_text(o)
        F1, P, R, common, lena, lenb = token_f1_details(orig_text, t)
        res.append((F1, P, R, common, o))
    res.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
    return res[:k]
